CustomField.description: Calculate the garnishment renewal date based on the garnishment date.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISNULL(Garnishment_Renewal_Date__c),CASE(Judgment_Province__c, 'British Columbia',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 24), 'Alberta',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 120), 'Saskatchewan',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 120), 'Manitoba',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 72), 'New Brunswick',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 180), 'Nova Scotia',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 60), 'Newfoundland and Labrador',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 120), 'Prince Edward Island',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 120), 'Ontario',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 72), 'Quebec',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 120), 'Yukon',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 24), 'Northwest Territories',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 24), 'Nunavut',ADDMONTHS(Garnishment_Date__c, 24), null),Garnishment_Renewal_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculate the garnishment renewal date based on the garnishment date.
CustomField.label: Garnishment Renewal Date
